description_long: This sculpture depicts a crouching male figure, rendered in a highly realistic and detailed style. The figure is nude, with defined musculature and curly hair, and is positioned on a rectangular plinth. The subject's arms are crossed in front of his knees, and his head is bowed, creating a compact, introspective pose. The surface of the sculpture is smooth and appears to be made of white marble or a similar stone, with subtle textural details in the hair and body. The overall impression is one of classical artistry, evoking themes of contemplation or vulnerability.
description: A highly detailed, white marble sculpture of a crouching nude male figure with crossed arms and bowed head, set on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's bowed head, crossed arms, and compact posture, with both knees and much of the torso visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the figure's profile, muscular back, and the curvature of the spine and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, shoulders, and the figure's seated position on the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's right arm and leg, as well as the detailed musculature and hair.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
